name: openclaw-langgraph-bridge
description: Bridges an OpenClaw agent acting as orchestrator with one or more LangGraph workflows.

langgraphBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the LangGraph server. Phase 1 tool calls fail fast when unset.

callbackToken.description: Shared secret the LangGraph workflow includes on inbound webhook POSTs. Required when the webhook handler is wired in Phase 2.

callbackPublicBaseUrl.description: Public base URL the LangGraph server should POST events to, e.g. http://kit-host:18794. The plugin appends `/plugins/openclaw-langgraph-bridge/events` when dispatching.

agentId.description: Agent id to wake via `openclaw agent` when a LangGraph event requires waking the session-bound agent. Default 'main'.

allowedWorkflows.description: Allowlist of assistant ids / graph ids the agent may dispatch. Empty/unset disables the allowlist.

defaultTimeoutMs.description: Per-request timeout for the LangGraph HTTP client. Default 10000.

summaryMaxChars.description: Maximum characters for event summaries in wake messages. Default 4000.

langgraphApiKey.description: API key for LangSmith Deployment (LangChain's hosted LangGraph). Sent as x-api-key header on all outbound HTTP calls to the LangGraph server. Not required for langgraph dev or self-hosted Aegra deployments.

langgraphAuthScheme.description: Auth scheme sent as x-auth-scheme alongside x-api-key. Required for LangSmith Fleet deployments (value: 'langsmith-api-key'). Leave unset for standard LangSmith Deployment, Aegra, or langgraph dev.

wakeBudget.description: Per-flow wake-budget circuit breaker (issue #91). Caps agent wakes at maxWakesPerFlowPerWindow per windowMs; excess wakes are coalesced into one trailing-edge wake.

maxWakesPerFlowPerWindow.description: Maximum agent wakes per flow_id per rolling window before the budget coalesces further wakes into a single trailing-edge wake. Default 15.

windowMs.description: Rolling window size in milliseconds for the per-flow wake budget. Default 60000 (1 minute).

dedup.description: Same-node milestone dedup + parallel-fanout collapse (issue #91). Set enabled=false and a high wakeBudget.maxWakesPerFlowPerWindow to restore pre-#91 behaviour.

enabled.description: Enable same-key milestone dedup + parallel-fanout collapse. Default true.

windowMs.description: Dedup / fanout-coalesce window in milliseconds. Same-key milestone repeats and concurrent finished keys within this window fold into one trailing-edge wake. Default 5000 (5 s).

wakeThinking.description: Per-event-class thinking level for proactive wakes (issue #100). milestone defaults to 'off' to stop reasoning-only retry churn; decision/hitl/terminal inherit the session level unless set.

milestone.description: Thinking level for milestone-event wakes. Default 'off' — suppresses reasoning-only agent turns that the openclaw runtime retries.

decision.description: Thinking level for decision-event wakes. When unset, inherits the session's configured reasoning level.

hitl.description: Thinking level for hitl-event wakes. When unset, inherits the session's configured reasoning level.

terminal.description: Thinking level for terminal-event wakes. When unset, inherits the session's configured reasoning level.
